message:
✨ Auto-reconnect terminals when server restarts (#45)

When a terminal WS connection drops and the tab has a tmux session,
automatically re-attach via the server API with exponential backoff
(up to 5 retries). Shows reconnection status in the terminal.
Also includes fix for attach menu hiding disconnected sessions.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
